title: dorycnium herbaceum subsp. intermedium
intro: Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. intermedium, also known as the intermediate knapweed or intermediate dyer's knapweed, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dorycnium herbaceum subsp. intermedium include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and efficacy.
